{
  "project": "inanc-tekstil",
  "branchName": "ralph/server-side-cart",
  "description": "Replace sessionStorage-based draft order URL with Postgres-backed cart items keyed to Shopify cart token. Fixes multi-product checkout and page-refresh bugs. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add curtain-db Postgres container to Docker Compose",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a dedicated Postgres container for curtain-checkout-api so that cart items can be persisted independently of the PMS database.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `curtain-db` service to docker-compose.yml at technical/gitopsprod/ using image postgres:16-alpine",
        "Service uses a named volume `curtain-db-data` for persistence",
        "curtain-db is NOT exposed on any host port — internal Docker network only",
        "curtain-app service has `CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL` env var: postgres://curtain:PASSWORD@curtain-db:5432/curtain",
        "curtain-app depends_on curtain-db in compose",
        "CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL added to /opt/inanctekstil/.env on the Hetzner server (use a strong random password)",
        "Document the new env var in technical/curtain-checkout-api/README.md under Environment variables"
      ],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add Postgres client, schema migration, and cleanup to curtain-checkout-api",
      "description": "As a developer, I want the curtain-checkout-api to connect to curtain-db and manage the cart_items table so that configured items can be stored and queried.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `postgres` npm package (porsager/postgres) to technical/curtain-checkout-api/package.json",
        "Create src/db.ts that exports a `sql` client using CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL env var",
        "On startup, run CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cart_items with columns: id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, cart_token TEXT NOT NULL, variant_id BIGINT NOT NULL, product_title TEXT NOT NULL, en_cm INT NOT NULL, boy_cm INT NOT NULL, pile_stili TEXT NOT NULL, pile_orani DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL, kanat TEXT NOT NULL, kanat_count INT NOT NULL, base_price_per_meter DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, calculated_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()",
        "On startup, run CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ON cart_items(cart_token, variant_id)",
        "Cleanup job: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' — runs on startup and every 24 hours via setInterval",
        "If CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL is not set, server throws on startup (fail fast)",
        "bun run typecheck passes",
        "bun test src/ passes"
      ],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "dependsOn": ["US-001"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement POST /api/checkout/item endpoint",
      "description": "As a customer, I want my curtain configuration to be saved server-side when I click Sepete Ekle so that my configuration survives page navigation and refresh.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "New endpoint POST /api/checkout/item accepts: cartToken (string), variantId (number), en (number), boy (number), pileStili (string), pileOrani (number), kanat (string), kanatCount (number)",
        "cartToken validation: present, non-empty, alphanumeric+hyphens only, max 64 chars — returns 400 MISSING_CART_TOKEN or INVALID_INPUT on failure",
        "All other field validations match existing /api/checkout/draft-order rules",
        "Fetches Shopify access token via client_credentials OAuth (same as existing endpoint)",
        "Fetches variant price + product_title from Shopify REST API server-side (never trusts client price)",
        "Calculates price: (en / 100) * pileOrani * kanatCount * basePricePerMeter",
        "Upserts row into cart_items — on conflict (cart_token, variant_id) update all fields",
        "Returns { ok: true, calculatedPrice: '1150.00' } on success",
        "Returns correct error codes: INVALID_INPUT (400), MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), VARIANT_NOT_FOUND (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), INVALID_PRICE (500), DB_ERROR (500)",
        "CORS origin restricted to https://inanctekstil.store (replaces origin: '*' in app.ts)",
        "Old POST /api/checkout/draft-order endpoint is removed",
        "bun run typecheck passes",
        "bun test src/ passes"
      ],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md — API endpoints section",
      "dependsOn": ["US-002"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Implement POST /api/checkout/complete endpoint",
      "description": "As a customer, I want a single checkout URL created for all my configured curtains when I click Ödeme so that I pay the correct price for every item.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "New endpoint POST /api/checkout/complete accepts: { cartToken: string }",
        "Validates cartToken with same format rules as /api/checkout/item",
        "Reads all cart_items rows for the cartToken from Postgres",
        "Returns 404 NO_ITEMS if no rows found (interceptor will fall through to normal checkout)",
        "Creates one Shopify Draft Order with all line items — each with correct calculated_price and properties (En, Boy, Pile Stili, Kanat, _variant_id)",
        "checkoutUrl returned is draft_order.invoice_url (NOT draft_order.checkout_url)",
        "On successful draft order creation, deletes all rows for this cartToken from Postgres",
        "Returns { checkoutUrl } on success",
        "Returns correct error codes: MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), NO_ITEMS (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED (500), DB_ERROR (500)",
        "Rate limiting: maximum 10 requests per minute per IP (use hono/basic-auth or a simple in-memory rate limiter middleware)",
        "bun run typecheck passes",
        "bun test src/ passes"
      ],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md — POST /api/checkout/complete section",
      "dependsOn": ["US-003"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Write tests for POST /api/checkout/item and POST /api/checkout/complete",
      "description": "As a developer, I want unit and integration tests for the new endpoints so that regressions are caught automatically.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tests for POST /api/checkout/item: valid request upserts row and returns calculatedPrice, missing cartToken returns 400, invalid cartToken format returns 400, variant not found returns 404, price formula correct for 200cm x2.5 x1 = 1150.00, price formula correct for 150cm x3.0 x2 = 1350.00",
        "Tests for POST /api/checkout/complete: valid request with 2 items creates draft order with 2 line items and returns checkoutUrl, empty cart returns 404 NO_ITEMS, rows are deleted after successful draft order creation",
        "Tests use mocked fetch (same pattern as existing app.test.ts) — no real Shopify or DB calls in unit tests",
        "bun test src/ passes with all new tests",
        "bun run typecheck passes"
      ],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Follow TDD: write failing tests first, then confirm implementation passes them. See existing test patterns in technical/curtain-checkout-api/src/app.test.ts",
      "dependsOn": ["US-004"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Update curtain-configurator.liquid to use /api/checkout/item",
      "description": "As a developer, I want the curtain configurator to register items server-side instead of storing a draft order URL in sessionStorage so that multi-product carts work correctly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Sepete Ekle handler: GET /cart.js first to obtain cartToken, then POST /api/checkout/item with { cartToken, variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }",
        "On /api/checkout/item success: proceed to POST /cart/add.js (unchanged), then open cart drawer (unchanged)",
        "All sessionStorage.getItem and sessionStorage.setItem calls removed from the section",
        "The checkout interceptor block (document.addEventListener capture-phase click handler) removed from this file entirely",
        "Button loading state: shows 'Hazırlanıyor...' while /api/checkout/item request is in flight",
        "Error handling: show Turkish error message inline if /api/checkout/item returns non-2xx",
        "shopify theme push --theme 193714913361 --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com --only 'sections/curtain-configurator.liquid' --nodelete --path technical/theme succeeds",
        "Verified in browser: adding TUL product does NOT store anything in sessionStorage (DevTools Application tab)"
      ],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Production theme ID: 193714913361. API URL: https://app.inanctekstil.store. Read technical/theme/sections/curtain-configurator.liquid before editing.",
      "dependsOn": ["US-003"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add global checkout interceptor to theme layout",
      "description": "As a customer, I want checkout to work correctly from any page (product page, cart page, or elsewhere) so that my configured prices are always honoured at checkout.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "New file technical/theme/assets/perde-checkout.js created",
        "Intercepts clicks on checkout buttons/links via document.addEventListener capture phase: selectors a[href*='/checkout'], button[name='checkout'], input[name='checkout'], a[href*='checkouts']",
        "On intercept: GET /cart.js → if cart empty fall through to normal checkout",
        "POST window.PERDE_API_URL + /api/checkout/complete with { cartToken: cart.token }",
        "If response is 404 (NO_ITEMS): fall through to normal checkout (window.location.href = btn.href || '/checkout')",
        "If response is ok: window.location.href = checkoutUrl",
        "Shows a loading indicator or disables the button while the request is in flight to prevent double-clicks",
        "layout/theme.liquid has <script>window.PERDE_API_URL = 'https://app.inanctekstil.store';</script> before </body>",
        "layout/theme.liquid has <script src=\"{{ 'perde-checkout.js' | asset_url }}\" defer></script> before </body>",
        "shopify theme push --theme 193714913361 --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com --only 'assets/perde-checkout.js' --only 'layout/theme.liquid' --nodelete --path technical/theme succeeds",
        "Verified in browser via Playwright: checkout from /cart page now redirects to draft order URL (not base price checkout)"
      ],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Production theme ID: 193714913361. Read technical/theme/layout/theme.liquid before editing.",
      "dependsOn": ["US-006"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Deploy curtain-checkout-api with curtain-db and verify end-to-end",
      "description": "As a developer, I want the new server-side cart deployed to production and verified so that multi-product checkout works for real customers.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "curtain-db container running on Hetzner: docker compose up -d curtain-db in /opt/inanctekstil/",
        "curtain-app redeployed with new code and CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL env var: docker compose up -d --build curtain-app",
        "Health check passes: curl https://app.inanctekstil.store/health returns {status:'ok'}",
        "E2E test via Playwright: add STN (150cm x Boru Pile x Cift Kanat) via configurator — cart shows 1,350 TL",
        "E2E test: navigate to TUL product page (does NOT clear DB rows), add TUL (200cm x Kanun Pile x Tek Kanat) — cart shows 2 items",
        "E2E test: click Odeme from /cart page — checkout URL is a Draft Order URL (not /checkout)",
        "E2E test: checkout shows both items — Saten Perde 1,350 TL and BORNOVA Tul Perde 1,150 TL — total 2,500 TL",
        "E2E test: page refresh between add-to-cart and checkout does NOT lose configured items",
        "Update curtain-checkout-api README.md Manual E2E Test Guide to reflect the new multi-product flow"
      ],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Server: ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158. Deploy: scp -r -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil src package.json tsconfig.json root@5.75.165.158:/opt/curtain-checkout-api/ then docker compose up -d --build curtain-app in /opt/inanctekstil/",
      "dependsOn": ["US-005", "US-007"]
    }
  ]
}

file.content:
services:
  traefik:
    image: traefik:v3
    container_name: traefik
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
      - ./traefik/traefik.yml:/traefik.yml:ro
      - ./traefik/acme.json:/acme.json
      - traefik-logs:/var/log/traefik
    networks:
      - web

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: pms
      POSTGRES_USER: pms
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    networks:
      - backend
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "pg_isready", "-U", "pms"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  pms:
    build:
      context: /opt/pms
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: pms
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://pms:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/pms
      SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN: ${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}
      SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}
      FAL_KEY: ${FAL_KEY}
      PRODUCTS_DIR: /app/products
      NODE_ENV: production
      LOG_LEVEL: info
    volumes:
      - /opt/products:/app/products:ro
    networks:
      - web
      - backend
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.rule=Host(`pms.inanctekstil.store`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.middlewares=pms-auth"
      - "traefik.http.services.pms.loadbalancer.server.port=3000"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.pms-auth.basicauth.users=admin:$$2y$$05$$/IP0o/4enTiZG6jLbBKuoOkfrsqpjbvkYsyzkDZi38tmIpe81V0O2"

  curtain-app:
    build:
      context: /opt/curtain-checkout-api
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: curtain-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN: ${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}
      PORT: "3001"
    networks:
      - web
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.rule=Host(`app.inanctekstil.store`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.curtain-app.loadbalancer.server.port=3001"

networks:
  web:
    name: web
  backend:
    name: backend
    internal: true

volumes:
  postgres-data:
  traefik-logs:

content.content:
1→# curtain-checkout-api
     2→
     3→Hono/Bun HTTP service that creates Shopify Draft Orders for custom-cut curtains.
     4→
     5→Deployed at `https://app.inanctekstil.store` (Docker on Hetzner `5.75.165.158`).
     6→
     7→---
     8→
     9→## Why this exists
    10→
    11→Shopify's Cart Transform API (which can override line item prices) requires **Shopify Plus**.
    12→The store is on Basic plan, so Cart Transform silently no-ops.
    13→
    14→The solution: when a customer configures a curtain, the frontend calls this service instead of
    15→adding to cart directly. The service calculates the correct price server-side, creates a
    16→**Draft Order** with that price, and returns a checkout URL. The frontend then:
    17→
    18→1. Stores the checkout URL in `sessionStorage`
    19→2. Adds the item to the Shopify cart (so the cart drawer shows the product)
    20→3. Intercepts any checkout button click and redirects to the Draft Order URL
    21→
    22→This means the cart drawer shows the item normally, but checkout always uses the server-calculated
    23→price — not the base per-metre price stored in the variant.
    24→
    25→---
    26→
    27→## Use case flow
    28→
    29→```
    30→Customer on product page
    31→  │
    32→  ▼
    33→Fills curtain configurator
    34→  (width, height, pleat style, panel count)
    35→  │
    36→  ▼
    37→Clicks "Sepete Ekle"
    38→  │
    39→  ├─► POST /api/checkout/draft-order
    40→  │     body: { variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }
    41→  │     ├─ Validates inputs
    42→  │     ├─ Gets short-lived Shopify token (client_credentials OAuth)
    43→  │     ├─ Fetches variant base price from Shopify REST (server-side — never trusts client)
    44→  │     ├─ Calculates: (en / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
    45→  │     ├─ Creates Draft Order with custom line item (correct price + order properties)
    46→  │     └─ Returns { checkoutUrl }
    47→  │
    48→  ├─► sessionStorage.setItem('perdeCheckoutUrl', checkoutUrl)
    49→  │
    50→  ├─► POST /cart/add.js   (Shopify storefront — adds variant to cart drawer)
    51→  │
    52→  └─► Cart drawer opens showing the item
    53→        │
    54→        ▼
    55→  Customer clicks "Checkout"
    56→        │
    57→        ▼
    58→  Click interceptor (capture phase) detects checkout button,
    59→  reads sessionStorage, redirects to Draft Order URL
    60→        │
    61→        ▼
    62→  Shopify checkout shows correct calculated price  ✓
    63→```
    64→
    65→### Price formula
    66→
    67→```
    68→price = (en_cm / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
    69→```
    70→
    71→| Parameter       | Description                                         |
    72→|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
    73→| `en_cm`         | Curtain width in centimetres (50–1000)              |
    74→| `pileOrani`     | Pleat ratio: 2.0 (Düz), 2.5 (Kanun Pile), 3.0 (Boru Pile) |
    75→| `kanatCount`    | Panel count: 1 (Tek Kanat) or 2 (Çift Kanat)       |
    76→| `basePricePerMeter` | Variant price from Shopify (₺ per metre of fabric) |
    77→
    78→Example: 200 cm × 2.5 × 1 × ₺230/m = **₺1,150.00**
    79→
    80→---
    81→
    82→## API
    83→
    84→### `POST /api/checkout/draft-order`
    85→
    86→**Request body** (JSON):
    87→
    88→```json
    89→{
    90→  "variantId": 12345678,
    91→  "en": 200,
    92→  "boy": 260,
    93→  "pileStili": "Kanun Pile",
    94→  "pileOrani": 2.5,
    95→  "kanat": "Tek Kanat",
    96→  "kanatCount": 1
    97→}
    98→```
    99→
   100→| Field        | Type    | Constraints                                   |
   101→|--------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------|
   102→| `variantId`  | number  | Must be a number                              |
   103→| `en`         | number  | 50–1000 cm                                    |
   104→| `boy`        | number  | 1–600 cm                                      |
   105→| `pileStili`  | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
   106→| `pileOrani`  | number  | One of: 2.0, 2.5, 3.0                        |
   107→| `kanat`      | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
   108→| `kanatCount` | number  | 1 or 2                                        |
   109→
   110→**Success response** `200`:
   111→
   112→```json
   113→{ "checkoutUrl": "https://inanctekstil.store/..." }
   114→```
   115→
   116→**Error responses**:
   117→
   118→| Status | `error`               | Cause                                      |
   119→|--------|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------|
   120→| 400    | `INVALID_INPUT`       | Validation failure (see message for detail)|
   121→| 404    | `VARIANT_NOT_FOUND`   | Shopify variant lookup failed              |
   122→| 500    | `AUTH_FAILED`         | Shopify OAuth token request failed         |
   123→| 500    | `INVALID_PRICE`       | Variant price is zero or negative          |
   124→| 500    | `DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED`  | Shopify Draft Orders API returned error    |
   125→
   126→### `GET /health`
   127→
   128→Returns `{ "status": "ok", "uptime": <seconds> }`.
   129→
   130→---
   131→
   132→## Environment variables
   133→
   134→| Variable                | Description                                              |
   135→|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
   136→| `SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN`  | e.g. `1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com`                         |
   137→| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID`     | Custom app client ID (for client_credentials OAuth)      |
   138→| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` | Custom app client secret                                 |
   139→| `PORT`                  | HTTP port (default: 3001)                                |
   140→
   141→Set in `/opt/inanctekstil/.env` on the Hetzner server.
   142→
   143→---
   144→
   145→## Development
   146→
   147→```bash
   148→bun install
   149→bun run dev        # watch mode
   150→bun test src/      # run tests
   151→bun run typecheck  # tsc --noEmit
   152→```
   153→
   154→## Deployment
   155→
   156→Manual deploy to Hetzner (`5.75.165.158`):
   157→
   158→```bash
   159→# Copy source to server
   160→scp -r -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil src package.json tsconfig.json \
   161→  root@5.75.165.158:/opt/curtain-checkout-api/
   162→
   163→# SSH and rebuild
   164→ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158
   165→cd /opt/inanctekstil
   166→docker compose up -d --build curtain-app
   167→```
   168→
   169→The service runs as the `curtain-app` container, exposed via Traefik at
   170→`https://app.inanctekstil.store`.
   171→
   172→---
   173→
   174→## Manual E2E test guide
   175→
   176→Tested on production store `inanctekstil.store`. Run this after any deployment.
   177→
   178→### Prerequisites
   179→- Browser with no existing cart (or clear the cart first at `/cart`)
   180→- API service is running: `curl https://app.inanctekstil.store/health` → `{"status":"ok",...}`
   181→
   182→---
   183→
   184→### Step 1 — Add TUL product via configurator
   185→
   186→1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/tul-bornova`
   187→2. **Verify**: standard variant picker and buy button are **hidden** (replaced by configurator)
   188→3. In Step 1 (Ölçü Seçimi), enter **En: 200**, **Boy: 250**
   189→4. **Verify**: "Devam Et" becomes enabled
   190→5. Click "Devam Et"
   191→6. **Verify**: Step 1 collapses to "Ölçü: 200 x 250 cm"; Step 2 pile style picker appears
   192→7. Select **Kanun Pile x2.5**
   193→8. Click "Devam Et"
   194→9. **Verify**: Step 2 collapses to "Pile: Kanun Pile"; Step 3 panel picker appears
   195→10. Select **Tek Kanat**
   196→11. Click "Devam Et"
   197→12. **Verify**: Step 3 collapses to "Kanat: Tek Kanat"; Step 4 Onay appears with:
   198→    - Review table: En 200 cm / Boy 250 cm / Pile Stili Kanun Pile / Kanat Tek Kanat
   199→    - **Tahmini Fiyat: 1.150,00 TL** ✓ (formula: 200/100 × 2.5 × 1 × 230)
   200→    - Disclaimer checkbox unchecked; "Sepete Ekle" disabled
   201→13. Check the disclaimer checkbox
   202→14. **Verify**: "Sepete Ekle" becomes enabled
   203→15. Click "Sepete Ekle"
   204→16. **Verify**: Button shows "Hazırlanıyor…" (draft order request in flight)
   205→17. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with:
   206→    - Item: BORNOVA Tül Perde
   207→    - Properties: En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat
   208→    - Line price: **1,150.00TL** ✓
   209→    - Tahmini toplam: 1.150,00 TL
   210→
   211→---
   212→
   213→### Step 2 — Add STN product via configurator
   214→
   215→All products are tagged `perde-tasarla` and show the curtain configurator.
   216→
   217→1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/stn-saten`
   218→2. **Verify**: Configurator is visible; standard buy button is hidden
   219→3. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **1** item from the TUL step
   220→4. Complete configurator: En=150, Boy=200 → Boru Pile x3.0 → Çift Kanat
   221→5. Check disclaimer, click "Sepete Ekle"
   222→6. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with STN line at **1,350.00TL**
   223→   - Formula: (150/100) × 3.0 × 2 × 150 = ₺1,350 ✓
   224→7. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **2**
   225→
   226→---
   227→
   228→### Step 3 — Verify cart drawer contents
   229→
   230→From the cart drawer (while still on `stn-saten` product page):
   231→
   232→| Item | Properties | Displayed line price |
   233→|------|-----------|---------------------|
   234→| BORNOVA Tül Perde | En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat | 1,150.00TL |
   235→| Saten Perde | En: 150 cm, Boy: 200 cm, Pile Stili: Boru Pile (x3), Kanat: Çift Kanat | 1,350.00TL |
   236→
   237→**Verify**: Tahmini toplam shows **2.500,00 TL** (patched by `perde-cart-total.js`) ✓
   238→
   239→---
   240→
   241→### Step 4 — Checkout from cart drawer (correct path for single-product)
   242→
   243→> ⚠️ **Important**: The checkout interceptor only works if you click checkout **while on the last configured product's page**. It only redirects to **that product's draft order** — other items are NOT included (see Known limitations).
   244→
   245→**Correct path (single product, Draft Order redirect):**
   246→1. After adding TUL, open the cart drawer while still on `products/tul-bornova`
   247→2. Click "Ödeme" inside the cart drawer
   248→3. **Verify**: URL changes to a Draft Order checkout URL
   249→4. **Verify**: Checkout shows **BORNOVA Tül Perde at ₺1,150.00** ✓ (not ₺230)
   250→5. **Verify**: All configuration properties are visible in the order line
   251→
   252→**Multi-product bug path (known issue):**
   253→1. Add STN via configurator on `stn-saten` (draft order URL A stored in sessionStorage)
   254→2. Navigate to `tul-bornova` — `init()` clears sessionStorage, URL A is lost
   255→3. Add TUL via configurator (draft order URL B stored in sessionStorage)
   256→4. Click "Ödeme" from cart drawer
   257→5. **Result**: Checkout shows **only TUL at ₺1,150** — STN (₺1,350) is absent ⚠️
   258→
   259→**Cart page bypass bug (known issue):**
   260→1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/cart` directly
   261→2. Click "Ödeme"
   262→3. **Result**: Regular Shopify checkout at base variant prices (₺230 + ₺150 = ₺380) — not calculated prices ⚠️
   263→
   264→---
   265→
   266→### Step 5 — Checkout form
   267→
   268→1. On the Shopify checkout page (Draft Order path):
   269→2. Fill in contact: email address
   270→3. Delivery method: "Gönder" (ship)
   271→4. Fill in shipping address: Ad, Soyadı, Adres, Şehir (country pre-set to Türkiye)
   272→5. **Verify**: Shipping method appears (e.g. Standart ₺89.00)
   273→6. **Verify**: Order summary shows correct prices
   274→7. Payment: "Kredi / Banka Kartı (PayTR)" — clicking "Şimdi öde" redirects to PayTR
   275→
   276→---
   277→
   278→## Known limitations
   279→
   280→- **Multi-product cart (critical)**: `sessionStorage` holds only one draft order URL at a time.
   281→  Each time a customer lands on a configurator product page, `init()` calls `removeItem` to clear
   282→  the previous URL. If a customer configures two products (e.g. STN then TUL), only the last
   283→  product's draft order URL survives. Clicking "Ödeme" from the cart drawer redirects to that
   284→  last draft order only — the earlier product is in the Shopify cart but not in the checkout order.
   285→  **Verified**: STN (₺1,350) + TUL (₺1,150) in cart → checkout shows only TUL at ₺1,150 ⚠️
   286→  **Fix options**: store a map of `variantId → checkoutUrl` in sessionStorage, or use a
   287→  server-side multi-item draft order, or add a global cart page interceptor that reads all stored URLs.
   288→
   289→- **Cart page checkout bypass**: The checkout interceptor is registered by the
   290→  `curtain-configurator` Liquid section, which only renders on pages tagged `perde-tasarla`.
   291→  If a customer navigates to `/cart` and clicks checkout there, the interceptor is not present
   292→  and Shopify routes to regular checkout at base variant prices.
   293→  **Workaround**: Customers should checkout from the cart drawer while on a product page, or
   294→  a global interceptor script should be added to the theme layout.
   295→
   296→- **sessionStorage lifetime**: If a customer refreshes the page between adding to cart and
   297→  clicking checkout, `sessionStorage` is cleared (init runs `removeItem`) and checkout falls
   298→  back to the base variant price. This is a known constraint of the Basic plan.
   299→
   300→- **Cart total display**: The Shopify cart/checkout shows the stored variant price in the cart
   301→  total. The `perde-cart-total.js` script patches the displayed total on product pages only.
   302→  The correct price is enforced at checkout via the Draft Order URL.
   303→

file.content:
# curtain-checkout-api

Hono/Bun HTTP service that creates Shopify Draft Orders for custom-cut curtains.

Deployed at `https://app.inanctekstil.store` (Docker on Hetzner `5.75.165.158`).

---

## Why this exists

Shopify's Cart Transform API (which can override line item prices) requires **Shopify Plus**.
The store is on Basic plan, so Cart Transform silently no-ops.

The solution: when a customer configures a curtain, the frontend calls this service instead of
adding to cart directly. The service calculates the correct price server-side, creates a
**Draft Order** with that price, and returns a checkout URL. The frontend then:

1. Stores the checkout URL in `sessionStorage`
2. Adds the item to the Shopify cart (so the cart drawer shows the product)
3. Intercepts any checkout button click and redirects to the Draft Order URL

This means the cart drawer shows the item normally, but checkout always uses the server-calculated
price — not the base per-metre price stored in the variant.

---

## Use case flow

```
Customer on product page
  │
  ▼
Fills curtain configurator
  (width, height, pleat style, panel count)
  │
  ▼
Clicks "Sepete Ekle"
  │
  ├─► POST /api/checkout/draft-order
  │     body: { variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }
  │     ├─ Validates inputs
  │     ├─ Gets short-lived Shopify token (client_credentials OAuth)
  │     ├─ Fetches variant base price from Shopify REST (server-side — never trusts client)
  │     ├─ Calculates: (en / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
  │     ├─ Creates Draft Order with custom line item (correct price + order properties)
  │     └─ Returns { checkoutUrl }
  │
  ├─► sessionStorage.setItem('perdeCheckoutUrl', checkoutUrl)
  │
  ├─► POST /cart/add.js   (Shopify storefront — adds variant to cart drawer)
  │
  └─► Cart drawer opens showing the item
        │
        ▼
  Customer clicks "Checkout"
        │
        ▼
  Click interceptor (capture phase) detects checkout button,
  reads sessionStorage, redirects to Draft Order URL
        │
        ▼
  Shopify checkout shows correct calculated price  ✓
```

### Price formula

```
price = (en_cm / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
```

| Parameter       | Description                                         |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| `en_cm`         | Curtain width in centimetres (50–1000)              |
| `pileOrani`     | Pleat ratio: 2.0 (Düz), 2.5 (Kanun Pile), 3.0 (Boru Pile) |
| `kanatCount`    | Panel count: 1 (Tek Kanat) or 2 (Çift Kanat)       |
| `basePricePerMeter` | Variant price from Shopify (₺ per metre of fabric) |

Example: 200 cm × 2.5 × 1 × ₺230/m = **₺1,150.00**

---

## API

### `POST /api/checkout/draft-order`

**Request body** (JSON):

```json
{
  "variantId": 12345678,
  "en": 200,
  "boy": 260,
  "pileStili": "Kanun Pile",
  "pileOrani": 2.5,
  "kanat": "Tek Kanat",
  "kanatCount": 1
}
```

| Field        | Type    | Constraints                                   |
|--------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `variantId`  | number  | Must be a number                              |
| `en`         | number  | 50–1000 cm                                    |
| `boy`        | number  | 1–600 cm                                      |
| `pileStili`  | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
| `pileOrani`  | number  | One of: 2.0, 2.5, 3.0                        |
| `kanat`      | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
| `kanatCount` | number  | 1 or 2                                        |

**Success response** `200`:

```json
{ "checkoutUrl": "https://inanctekstil.store/..." }
```

**Error responses**:

| Status | `error`               | Cause                                      |
|--------|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| 400    | `INVALID_INPUT`       | Validation failure (see message for detail)|
| 404    | `VARIANT_NOT_FOUND`   | Shopify variant lookup failed              |
| 500    | `AUTH_FAILED`         | Shopify OAuth token request failed         |
| 500    | `INVALID_PRICE`       | Variant price is zero or negative          |
| 500    | `DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED`  | Shopify Draft Orders API returned error    |

### `GET /health`

Returns `{ "status": "ok", "uptime": <seconds> }`.

---

## Environment variables

| Variable                | Description                                              |
|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| `SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN`  | e.g. `1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com`                         |
| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID`     | Custom app client ID (for client_credentials OAuth)      |
| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` | Custom app client secret                                 |
| `PORT`                  | HTTP port (default: 3001)                                |

Set in `/opt/inanctekstil/.env` on the Hetzner server.

---

## Development

```bash
bun install
bun run dev        # watch mode
bun test src/      # run tests
bun run typecheck  # tsc --noEmit
```

## Deployment

Manual deploy to Hetzner (`5.75.165.158`):

```bash
# Copy source to server
scp -r -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil src package.json tsconfig.json \
  root@5.75.165.158:/opt/curtain-checkout-api/

# SSH and rebuild
ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158
cd /opt/inanctekstil
docker compose up -d --build curtain-app
```

The service runs as the `curtain-app` container, exposed via Traefik at
`https://app.inanctekstil.store`.

---

## Manual E2E test guide

Tested on production store `inanctekstil.store`. Run this after any deployment.

### Prerequisites
- Browser with no existing cart (or clear the cart first at `/cart`)
- API service is running: `curl https://app.inanctekstil.store/health` → `{"status":"ok",...}`

---

### Step 1 — Add TUL product via configurator

1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/tul-bornova`
2. **Verify**: standard variant picker and buy button are **hidden** (replaced by configurator)
3. In Step 1 (Ölçü Seçimi), enter **En: 200**, **Boy: 250**
4. **Verify**: "Devam Et" becomes enabled
5. Click "Devam Et"
6. **Verify**: Step 1 collapses to "Ölçü: 200 x 250 cm"; Step 2 pile style picker appears
7. Select **Kanun Pile x2.5**
8. Click "Devam Et"
9. **Verify**: Step 2 collapses to "Pile: Kanun Pile"; Step 3 panel picker appears
10. Select **Tek Kanat**
11. Click "Devam Et"
12. **Verify**: Step 3 collapses to "Kanat: Tek Kanat"; Step 4 Onay appears with:
    - Review table: En 200 cm / Boy 250 cm / Pile Stili Kanun Pile / Kanat Tek Kanat
    - **Tahmini Fiyat: 1.150,00 TL** ✓ (formula: 200/100 × 2.5 × 1 × 230)
    - Disclaimer checkbox unchecked; "Sepete Ekle" disabled
13. Check the disclaimer checkbox
14. **Verify**: "Sepete Ekle" becomes enabled
15. Click "Sepete Ekle"
16. **Verify**: Button shows "Hazırlanıyor…" (draft order request in flight)
17. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with:
    - Item: BORNOVA Tül Perde
    - Properties: En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat
    - Line price: **1,150.00TL** ✓
    - Tahmini toplam: 1.150,00 TL

---

### Step 2 — Add STN product via configurator

All products are tagged `perde-tasarla` and show the curtain configurator.

1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/stn-saten`
2. **Verify**: Configurator is visible; standard buy button is hidden
3. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **1** item from the TUL step
4. Complete configurator: En=150, Boy=200 → Boru Pile x3.0 → Çift Kanat
5. Check disclaimer, click "Sepete Ekle"
6. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with STN line at **1,350.00TL**
   - Formula: (150/100) × 3.0 × 2 × 150 = ₺1,350 ✓
7. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **2**

---

### Step 3 — Verify cart drawer contents

From the cart drawer (while still on `stn-saten` product page):

| Item | Properties | Displayed line price |
|------|-----------|---------------------|
| BORNOVA Tül Perde | En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat | 1,150.00TL |
| Saten Perde | En: 150 cm, Boy: 200 cm, Pile Stili: Boru Pile (x3), Kanat: Çift Kanat | 1,350.00TL |

**Verify**: Tahmini toplam shows **2.500,00 TL** (patched by `perde-cart-total.js`) ✓

---

### Step 4 — Checkout from cart drawer (correct path for single-product)

> ⚠️ **Important**: The checkout interceptor only works if you click checkout **while on the last configured product's page**. It only redirects to **that product's draft order** — other items are NOT included (see Known limitations).

**Correct path (single product, Draft Order redirect):**
1. After adding TUL, open the cart drawer while still on `products/tul-bornova`
2. Click "Ödeme" inside the cart drawer
3. **Verify**: URL changes to a Draft Order checkout URL
4. **Verify**: Checkout shows **BORNOVA Tül Perde at ₺1,150.00** ✓ (not ₺230)
5. **Verify**: All configuration properties are visible in the order line

**Multi-product bug path (known issue):**
1. Add STN via configurator on `stn-saten` (draft order URL A stored in sessionStorage)
2. Navigate to `tul-bornova` — `init()` clears sessionStorage, URL A is lost
3. Add TUL via configurator (draft order URL B stored in sessionStorage)
4. Click "Ödeme" from cart drawer
5. **Result**: Checkout shows **only TUL at ₺1,150** — STN (₺1,350) is absent ⚠️

**Cart page bypass bug (known issue):**
1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/cart` directly
2. Click "Ödeme"
3. **Result**: Regular Shopify checkout at base variant prices (₺230 + ₺150 = ₺380) — not calculated prices ⚠️

---

### Step 5 — Checkout form

1. On the Shopify checkout page (Draft Order path):
2. Fill in contact: email address
3. Delivery method: "Gönder" (ship)
4. Fill in shipping address: Ad, Soyadı, Adres, Şehir (country pre-set to Türkiye)
5. **Verify**: Shipping method appears (e.g. Standart ₺89.00)
6. **Verify**: Order summary shows correct prices
7. Payment: "Kredi / Banka Kartı (PayTR)" — clicking "Şimdi öde" redirects to PayTR

---

## Known limitations

- **Multi-product cart (critical)**: `sessionStorage` holds only one draft order URL at a time.
  Each time a customer lands on a configurator product page, `init()` calls `removeItem` to clear
  the previous URL. If a customer configures two products (e.g. STN then TUL), only the last
  product's draft order URL survives. Clicking "Ödeme" from the cart drawer redirects to that
  last draft order only — the earlier product is in the Shopify cart but not in the checkout order.
  **Verified**: STN (₺1,350) + TUL (₺1,150) in cart → checkout shows only TUL at ₺1,150 ⚠️
  **Fix options**: store a map of `variantId → checkoutUrl` in sessionStorage, or use a
  server-side multi-item draft order, or add a global cart page interceptor that reads all stored URLs.

- **Cart page checkout bypass**: The checkout interceptor is registered by the
  `curtain-configurator` Liquid section, which only renders on pages tagged `perde-tasarla`.
  If a customer navigates to `/cart` and clicks checkout there, the interceptor is not present
  and Shopify routes to regular checkout at base variant prices.
  **Workaround**: Customers should checkout from the cart drawer while on a product page, or
  a global interceptor script should be added to the theme layout.

- **sessionStorage lifetime**: If a customer refreshes the page between adding to cart and
  clicking checkout, `sessionStorage` is cleared (init runs `removeItem`) and checkout falls
  back to the base variant price. This is a known constraint of the Basic plan.

- **Cart total display**: The Shopify cart/checkout shows the stored variant price in the cart
  total. The `perde-cart-total.js` script patches the displayed total on product pages only.
  The correct price is enforced at checkout via the Draft Order URL.

- **Cart Transform** (which would fix all price display issues) requires Shopify Plus.

Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me implement US-001: Add curtain-db Postgres container to Docker Compose.

The acceptance criteria:
1. Add `curtain-db` service to docker-compose.yml using postgres:16-alpine
2. Service uses named volume `curtain-db-data` for persistence
3. curtain-db is NOT exposed on any host port (internal Docker network only)
4. curtain-app service has `CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL` env var: postgres://curtain:PASSWORD@curtain-db:5432/curtain
5. curtain-app depends_on curtain-db in compose


6. I need to set up the actual password in the Hetzner server's .env file, but keep it out of version control
7. The docker-compose.yml will reference the env variable instead of hardcoding credentials, and I'll document the new variable in the README

Let me start by updating the compose file and then documenting the setup. I'm weighing whether to pass the full database URL as a single env var or construct it from separate password and username components in the compose file. The cleanest approach is to keep the full `CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL` as one env var for the app, while the database service gets its own `CURTAIN_DB_PASSWORD` for the Postgres configuration. I also need to make sure curtain-db sits on the internal `backend` network alongside the app so they can communicate, and I'll document the server setup requirements without committing any actual passwords.

tool_use_result.originalFile:
services:
  traefik:
    image: traefik:v3
    container_name: traefik
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
      - ./traefik/traefik.yml:/traefik.yml:ro
      - ./traefik/acme.json:/acme.json
      - traefik-logs:/var/log/traefik
    networks:
      - web

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: pms
      POSTGRES_USER: pms
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    networks:
      - backend
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "pg_isready", "-U", "pms"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  pms:
    build:
      context: /opt/pms
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: pms
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://pms:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/pms
      SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN: ${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}
      SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}
      FAL_KEY: ${FAL_KEY}
      PRODUCTS_DIR: /app/products
      NODE_ENV: production
      LOG_LEVEL: info
    volumes:
      - /opt/products:/app/products:ro
    networks:
      - web
      - backend
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.rule=Host(`pms.inanctekstil.store`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.routers.pms.middlewares=pms-auth"
      - "traefik.http.services.pms.loadbalancer.server.port=3000"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.pms-auth.basicauth.users=admin:$$2y$$05$$/IP0o/4enTiZG6jLbBKuoOkfrsqpjbvkYsyzkDZi38tmIpe81V0O2"

  curtain-app:
    build:
      context: /opt/curtain-checkout-api
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: curtain-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN: ${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}
      PORT: "3001"
    networks:
      - web
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.rule=Host(`app.inanctekstil.store`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.curtain-app.loadbalancer.server.port=3001"

networks:
  web:
    name: web
  backend:
    name: backend
    internal: true

volumes:
  postgres-data:
  traefik-logs:

      - "traefik.http.middlewares.pms-auth.basicauth.users=admin:$$2y$$05$$/IP0o/4enTiZG6jLbBKuoOkfrsqpjbvkYsyzkDZi38tmIpe81V0O2"

  curtain-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: curtain-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: curtain
      POSTGRES_USER: curtain
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${CURTAIN_DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - curtain-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    networks:
      - backend
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "pg_isready", "-U", "curtain"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  curtain-app:
    build:
      context: /opt/curtain-checkout-api
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: curtain-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      curtain-db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN: ${SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID}
      SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET: ${SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET}
      CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL: ${CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL}
      PORT: "3001"
    networks:
      - web
      - backend
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.rule=Host(`app.inanctekstil.store`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.curtain-app.tls.certresolver=letsencrypt"
      - "traefik.http.services.curtain-app.loadbalancer.server.port=3001"

networks:
  web:
    name: web
  backend:
    name: backend
    internal: true

volumes:
  postgres-data:
  traefik-logs:

tool_use_result.originalFile:
# curtain-checkout-api

Hono/Bun HTTP service that creates Shopify Draft Orders for custom-cut curtains.

Deployed at `https://app.inanctekstil.store` (Docker on Hetzner `5.75.165.158`).

---

## Why this exists

Shopify's Cart Transform API (which can override line item prices) requires **Shopify Plus**.
The store is on Basic plan, so Cart Transform silently no-ops.

The solution: when a customer configures a curtain, the frontend calls this service instead of
adding to cart directly. The service calculates the correct price server-side, creates a
**Draft Order** with that price, and returns a checkout URL. The frontend then:

1. Stores the checkout URL in `sessionStorage`
2. Adds the item to the Shopify cart (so the cart drawer shows the product)
3. Intercepts any checkout button click and redirects to the Draft Order URL

This means the cart drawer shows the item normally, but checkout always uses the server-calculated
price — not the base per-metre price stored in the variant.

---

## Use case flow

```
Customer on product page
  │
  ▼
Fills curtain configurator
  (width, height, pleat style, panel count)
  │
  ▼
Clicks "Sepete Ekle"
  │
  ├─► POST /api/checkout/draft-order
  │     body: { variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }
  │     ├─ Validates inputs
  │     ├─ Gets short-lived Shopify token (client_credentials OAuth)
  │     ├─ Fetches variant base price from Shopify REST (server-side — never trusts client)
  │     ├─ Calculates: (en / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
  │     ├─ Creates Draft Order with custom line item (correct price + order properties)
  │     └─ Returns { checkoutUrl }
  │
  ├─► sessionStorage.setItem('perdeCheckoutUrl', checkoutUrl)
  │
  ├─► POST /cart/add.js   (Shopify storefront — adds variant to cart drawer)
  │
  └─► Cart drawer opens showing the item
        │
        ▼
  Customer clicks "Checkout"
        │
        ▼
  Click interceptor (capture phase) detects checkout button,
  reads sessionStorage, redirects to Draft Order URL
        │
        ▼
  Shopify checkout shows correct calculated price  ✓
```

### Price formula

```
price = (en_cm / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter
```

| Parameter       | Description                                         |
|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| `en_cm`         | Curtain width in centimetres (50–1000)              |
| `pileOrani`     | Pleat ratio: 2.0 (Düz), 2.5 (Kanun Pile), 3.0 (Boru Pile) |
| `kanatCount`    | Panel count: 1 (Tek Kanat) or 2 (Çift Kanat)       |
| `basePricePerMeter` | Variant price from Shopify (₺ per metre of fabric) |

Example: 200 cm × 2.5 × 1 × ₺230/m = **₺1,150.00**

---

## API

### `POST /api/checkout/draft-order`

**Request body** (JSON):

```json
{
  "variantId": 12345678,
  "en": 200,
  "boy": 260,
  "pileStili": "Kanun Pile",
  "pileOrani": 2.5,
  "kanat": "Tek Kanat",
  "kanatCount": 1
}
```

| Field        | Type    | Constraints                                   |
|--------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------|
| `variantId`  | number  | Must be a number                              |
| `en`         | number  | 50–1000 cm                                    |
| `boy`        | number  | 1–600 cm                                      |
| `pileStili`  | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
| `pileOrani`  | number  | One of: 2.0, 2.5, 3.0                        |
| `kanat`      | string  | Display label (stored in order properties)    |
| `kanatCount` | number  | 1 or 2                                        |

**Success response** `200`:

```json
{ "checkoutUrl": "https://inanctekstil.store/..." }
```

**Error responses**:

| Status | `error`               | Cause                                      |
|--------|-----------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| 400    | `INVALID_INPUT`       | Validation failure (see message for detail)|
| 404    | `VARIANT_NOT_FOUND`   | Shopify variant lookup failed              |
| 500    | `AUTH_FAILED`         | Shopify OAuth token request failed         |
| 500    | `INVALID_PRICE`       | Variant price is zero or negative          |
| 500    | `DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED`  | Shopify Draft Orders API returned error    |

### `GET /health`

Returns `{ "status": "ok", "uptime": <seconds> }`.

---

## Environment variables

| Variable                | Description                                              |
|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| `SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN`  | e.g. `1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com`                         |
| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID`     | Custom app client ID (for client_credentials OAuth)      |
| `SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` | Custom app client secret                                 |
| `PORT`                  | HTTP port (default: 3001)                                |

Set in `/opt/inanctekstil/.env` on the Hetzner server.

---

## Development

```bash
bun install
bun run dev        # watch mode
bun test src/      # run tests
bun run typecheck  # tsc --noEmit
```

## Deployment

Manual deploy to Hetzner (`5.75.165.158`):

```bash
# Copy source to server
scp -r -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil src package.json tsconfig.json \
  root@5.75.165.158:/opt/curtain-checkout-api/

# SSH and rebuild
ssh -i ~/.ssh/inanctekstil root@5.75.165.158
cd /opt/inanctekstil
docker compose up -d --build curtain-app
```

The service runs as the `curtain-app` container, exposed via Traefik at
`https://app.inanctekstil.store`.

---

## Manual E2E test guide

Tested on production store `inanctekstil.store`. Run this after any deployment.

### Prerequisites
- Browser with no existing cart (or clear the cart first at `/cart`)
- API service is running: `curl https://app.inanctekstil.store/health` → `{"status":"ok",...}`

---

### Step 1 — Add TUL product via configurator

1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/tul-bornova`
2. **Verify**: standard variant picker and buy button are **hidden** (replaced by configurator)
3. In Step 1 (Ölçü Seçimi), enter **En: 200**, **Boy: 250**
4. **Verify**: "Devam Et" becomes enabled
5. Click "Devam Et"
6. **Verify**: Step 1 collapses to "Ölçü: 200 x 250 cm"; Step 2 pile style picker appears
7. Select **Kanun Pile x2.5**
8. Click "Devam Et"
9. **Verify**: Step 2 collapses to "Pile: Kanun Pile"; Step 3 panel picker appears
10. Select **Tek Kanat**
11. Click "Devam Et"
12. **Verify**: Step 3 collapses to "Kanat: Tek Kanat"; Step 4 Onay appears with:
    - Review table: En 200 cm / Boy 250 cm / Pile Stili Kanun Pile / Kanat Tek Kanat
    - **Tahmini Fiyat: 1.150,00 TL** ✓ (formula: 200/100 × 2.5 × 1 × 230)
    - Disclaimer checkbox unchecked; "Sepete Ekle" disabled
13. Check the disclaimer checkbox
14. **Verify**: "Sepete Ekle" becomes enabled
15. Click "Sepete Ekle"
16. **Verify**: Button shows "Hazırlanıyor…" (draft order request in flight)
17. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with:
    - Item: BORNOVA Tül Perde
    - Properties: En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat
    - Line price: **1,150.00TL** ✓
    - Tahmini toplam: 1.150,00 TL

---

### Step 2 — Add STN product via configurator

All products are tagged `perde-tasarla` and show the curtain configurator.

1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/products/stn-saten`
2. **Verify**: Configurator is visible; standard buy button is hidden
3. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **1** item from the TUL step
4. Complete configurator: En=150, Boy=200 → Boru Pile x3.0 → Çift Kanat
5. Check disclaimer, click "Sepete Ekle"
6. **Verify**: Cart drawer opens with STN line at **1,350.00TL**
   - Formula: (150/100) × 3.0 × 2 × 150 = ₺1,350 ✓
7. **Verify**: Cart badge shows **2**

---

### Step 3 — Verify cart drawer contents

From the cart drawer (while still on `stn-saten` product page):

| Item | Properties | Displayed line price |
|------|-----------|---------------------|
| BORNOVA Tül Perde | En: 200 cm, Boy: 250 cm, Pile Stili: Kanun Pile (x2.5), Kanat: Tek Kanat | 1,150.00TL |
| Saten Perde | En: 150 cm, Boy: 200 cm, Pile Stili: Boru Pile (x3), Kanat: Çift Kanat | 1,350.00TL |

**Verify**: Tahmini toplam shows **2.500,00 TL** (patched by `perde-cart-total.js`) ✓

---

### Step 4 — Checkout from cart drawer (correct path for single-product)

> ⚠️ **Important**: The checkout interceptor only works if you click checkout **while on the last configured product's page**. It only redirects to **that product's draft order** — other items are NOT included (see Known limitations).

**Correct path (single product, Draft Order redirect):**
1. After adding TUL, open the cart drawer while still on `products/tul-bornova`
2. Click "Ödeme" inside the cart drawer
3. **Verify**: URL changes to a Draft Order checkout URL
4. **Verify**: Checkout shows **BORNOVA Tül Perde at ₺1,150.00** ✓ (not ₺230)
5. **Verify**: All configuration properties are visible in the order line

**Multi-product bug path (known issue):**
1. Add STN via configurator on `stn-saten` (draft order URL A stored in sessionStorage)
2. Navigate to `tul-bornova` — `init()` clears sessionStorage, URL A is lost
3. Add TUL via configurator (draft order URL B stored in sessionStorage)
4. Click "Ödeme" from cart drawer
5. **Result**: Checkout shows **only TUL at ₺1,150** — STN (₺1,350) is absent ⚠️

**Cart page bypass bug (known issue):**
1. Navigate to `https://inanctekstil.store/cart` directly
2. Click "Ödeme"
3. **Result**: Regular Shopify checkout at base variant prices (₺230 + ₺150 = ₺380) — not calculated prices ⚠️

---

### Step 5 — Checkout form

1. On the Shopify checkout page (Draft Order path):
2. Fill in contact: email address
3. Delivery method: "Gönder" (ship)
4. Fill in shipping address: Ad, Soyadı, Adres, Şehir (country pre-set to Türkiye)
5. **Verify**: Shipping method appears (e.g. Standart ₺89.00)
6. **Verify**: Order summary shows correct prices
7. Payment: "Kredi / Banka Kartı (PayTR)" — clicking "Şimdi öde" redirects to PayTR

---

## Known limitations

- **Multi-product cart (critical)**: `sessionStorage` holds only one draft order URL at a time.
  Each time a customer lands on a configurator product page, `init()` calls `removeItem` to clear
  the previous URL. If a customer configures two products (e.g. STN then TUL), only the last
  product's draft order URL survives. Clicking "Ödeme" from the cart drawer redirects to that
  last draft order only — the earlier product is in the Shopify cart but not in the checkout order.
  **Verified**: STN (₺1,350) + TUL (₺1,150) in cart → checkout shows only TUL at ₺1,150 ⚠️
  **Fix options**: store a map of `variantId → checkoutUrl` in sessionStorage, or use a
  server-side multi-item draft order, or add a global cart page interceptor that reads all stored URLs.

- **Cart page checkout bypass**: The checkout interceptor is registered by the
  `curtain-configurator` Liquid section, which only renders on pages tagged `perde-tasarla`.
  If a customer navigates to `/cart` and clicks checkout there, the interceptor is not present
  and Shopify routes to regular checkout at base variant prices.
  **Workaround**: Customers should checkout from the cart drawer while on a product page, or
  a global interceptor script should be added to the theme layout.

- **sessionStorage lifetime**: If a customer refreshes the page between adding to cart and
  clicking checkout, `sessionStorage` is cleared (init runs `removeItem`) and checkout falls
  back to the base variant price. This is a known constraint of the Basic plan.

- **Cart total display**: The Shopify cart/checkout shows the stored variant price in the cart
  total. The `perde-cart-total.js` script patches the displayed total on product pages only.
  The correct price is enforced at checkout via the Draft Order URL.

- **Cart Transform** (which would fix all price display issues) requires Shopify Plus.

{

  "branchName": "ralph/server-side-cart",
  "description": "Replace sessionStorage-based draft order URL with Postgres-backed cart items keyed to Shopify cart token. Fixes multi-product checkout and page-refresh bugs. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add curtain-db Postgres container to Docker Compose",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a dedicated Postgres container for curtain-checkout-api so that cart items can be persisted independently of the PMS database.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `curtain-db` service to docker-compose.yml at technical/gitopsprod/ using image postgres:16-alpine",
        "Service uses a named volume `curtain-db-data` for persistence",
        "curtain-db is NOT exposed on any host port — internal Docker network only",
        "curtain-app service has `CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL` env var: postgres://curtain:PASSWORD@curtain-db:5432/curtain",
        "curtain-app depends_on curtain-db in compose",
        "CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL added to /opt/inanctekstil/.env on the Hetzner server (use a strong random password)",
        "Document the new env var in technical/curtain-checkout-api/README.md under Environment variables"
      ],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add Postgres client, schema migration, and cleanup to curtain-checkout-api",
      "description": "As a developer, I want the curtain-checkout-api to connect to curtain-db and manage the cart_items table so that configured items can be stored and queried.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add `postgres` npm package (porsager/postgres) to technical/curtain-checkout-api/package.json",
        "Create src/db.ts that exports a `sql` client using CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL env var",
        "On startup, run CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cart_items with columns: id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, cart_token TEXT NOT NULL, variant_id BIGINT NOT NULL, product_title TEXT NOT NULL, en_cm INT NOT NULL, boy_cm INT NOT NULL, pile_stili TEXT NOT NULL, pile_orani DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL, kanat TEXT NOT NULL, kanat_count INT NOT NULL, base_price_per_meter DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, calculated_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()",
        "On startup, run CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ON cart_items(cart_token, variant_id)",
        "Cleanup job: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' — runs on startup and every 24 hours via setInterval",
        "If CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL is not set, server throws on startup (fail fast)",
        "bun run typecheck passes",
        "bun test src/ passes"
      ],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "dependsOn": ["US-001"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement POST /api/checkout/item endpoint",
      "description": "As a customer, I want my curtain configuration to be saved server-side when I click Sepete Ekle so that my configuration survives page navigation and refresh.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "New endpoint POST /api/checkout/item accepts: cartToken (string), variantId (number), en (number), boy (number), pileStili (string), pileOrani (number), kanat (string), kanatCount (number)",
        "cartToken validation: present, non-empty, alphanumeric+hyphens only, max 64 chars — returns 400 MISSING_CART_TOKEN or INVALID_INPUT on failure",
        "All other field validations match existing /api/checkout/draft-order rules",
        "Fetches Shopify access token via client_credentials OAuth (same as existing endpoint)",
        "Fetches variant price + product_title from Shopify REST API server-side (never trusts client price)",
        "Calculates price: (en / 100) * pileOrani * kanatCount * basePricePerMeter",
        "Upserts row into cart_items — on conflict (cart_token, variant_id) update all fields",
        "Returns { ok: true, calculatedPrice: '1150.00' } on success",
        "Returns correct error codes: INVALID_INPUT (400), MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), VARIANT_NOT_FOUND (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), INVALID_PRICE (500), DB_ERROR (500)",
        "CORS origin restricted to https://inanctekstil.store (replaces origin: '*' in app.ts)",
        "Old POST /api/checkout/draft-order endpoint is removed",
        "bun run typecheck passes",
        "bun test src/ passes"
      ],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-19-server-side-cart-design.md — API endpoints section",
      "dependsOn": ["US-002"]

      "description": "As a customer, I want a single checkout URL created for all my configured curtains when I click Ödeme so that I pay the correct price for every item.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "New endpoint POST /api/checkout/complete accepts: { cartToken: string }",
        "Validates cartToken with same format rules as /api/checkout/item",
        "Reads all cart_items rows for the cartToken from Postgres",

        "Creates one Shopify Draft Order with all line items — each with correct calculated_price and properties (En, Boy, Pile Stili, Kanat, _variant_id)",
        "checkoutUrl returned is draft_order.invoice_url (NOT draft_order.checkout_url)",
        "On successful draft order creation, deletes all rows for this cartToken from Postgres",
        "Returns { checkoutUrl } on success",
        "Returns correct error codes: MISSING_CART_TOKEN (400), NO_ITEMS (404), AUTH_FAILED (500), DRAFT_ORDER_FAILED (500), DB_ERROR (500)",

        "Tests for POST /api/checkout/complete: valid request with 2 items creates draft order with 2 line items and returns checkoutUrl, empty cart returns 404 NO_ITEMS, rows are deleted after successful draft order creation",

        "bun test src/ passes with all new tests",
        "bun run typecheck passes"
      ],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "Follow TDD: write failing tests first, then confirm implementation passes them. See existing test patterns in technical/curtain-checkout-api/src/app.test.ts",
      "dependsOn": ["US-004"]
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Update curtain-configurator.liquid to use /api/checkout/item",
      "description": "As a developer, I want the curtain configurator to register items server-side instead of storing a draft order URL in sessionStorage so that multi-product carts work correctly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Sepete Ekle handler: GET /cart.js first to obtain cartToken, then POST /api/checkout/item with { cartToken, variantId, en, boy, pileStili, pileOrani, kanat, kanatCount }",
        "On /api/checkout/item success: proceed to POST /cart/add.js (unchanged), then open cart drawer (unchanged)",

content.text: Now US-003: Implement `POST /api/checkout/item`. Let me also read the design spec for guidance:

content.content:
1→# Server-side curtain cart design
     2→
     3→**Date:** 2026-03-19
     4→**Status:** Approved
     5→
     6→## Problem
     7→
     8→The current checkout flow stores a single draft order URL in `sessionStorage`. This breaks in two ways:
     9→
    10→1. **Multi-product**: navigating to a second product page clears the first product's URL. Checkout only covers the last configured item.
    11→2. **Page refresh**: `sessionStorage` is cleared on init, so the URL is lost if the customer refreshes before checking out.
    12→
    13→## Solution
    14→
    15→Store configured items in Postgres keyed to the Shopify cart token. Create one draft order containing all items only when the customer clicks checkout.
    16→
    17→## Architecture
    18→
    19→```
    20→Add to cart (per product)              Checkout (once, anywhere)
    21→──────────────────────────             ─────────────────────────
    22→Customer fills configurator            Customer clicks "Ödeme"
    23→→ POST /api/checkout/item              → global interceptor fires
    24→  {cartToken, variantId, dims}           (theme.liquid, every page)
    25→  → validate + calculate price         → GET /cart.js → cart token
    26→  → upsert row in Postgres             → POST /api/checkout/complete
    27→  → return {ok, calculatedPrice}         → read all rows for token
    28→→ POST /cart/add.js (Shopify)            → create ONE draft order
    29→→ cart drawer opens                      → return {checkoutUrl}
    30→                                       → redirect to Shopify checkout
    31→```
    32→
    33→The Shopify cart token (from `/cart.js`) is stable across page refreshes — Shopify stores it in its own session cookie. No data lives in the browser.
    34→
    35→If the cart has no configured items in Postgres (e.g. future non-curtain product), the interceptor receives a 404 and falls through to normal Shopify checkout.
    36→
    37→## Infrastructure
    38→
    39→A new `curtain-db` Postgres container is added to the Docker Compose stack at `/opt/inanctekstil/`. It is isolated from the existing PMS `postgres` container.
    40→
    41→**CORS**: the API restricts `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` to `https://inanctekstil.store` only. The current `origin: "*"` setting is replaced. This is the only legitimate caller.
    42→
    43→```
    44→Docker Compose stack (/opt/inanctekstil/)
    45→├── traefik       (existing)
    46→├── postgres      (existing — PMS only)
    47→├── pms           (existing)
    48→├── curtain-app   (existing → gets DATABASE_URL for curtain-db)
    49→└── curtain-db    (NEW — postgres:16-alpine, curtain database)
    50→```
    51→
    52→`curtain-db` is not exposed on any host port. Connection string added to `.env`:
    53→
    54→```
    55→CURTAIN_DATABASE_URL=postgres://curtain:PASSWORD@curtain-db:5432/curtain
    56→```
    57→
    58→## Database schema
    59→
    60→```sql
    61→CREATE TABLE cart_items (
    62→  id                   SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    63→  cart_token           TEXT         NOT NULL,
    64→  variant_id           BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    65→  product_title        TEXT         NOT NULL,
    66→  en_cm                INT          NOT NULL,
    67→  boy_cm               INT          NOT NULL,
    68→  pile_stili           TEXT         NOT NULL,
    69→  pile_orani           DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL,
    70→  kanat                TEXT         NOT NULL,
    71→  kanat_count          INT          NOT NULL,
    72→  base_price_per_meter DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    73→  calculated_price     DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
    74→  created_at           TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()
    75→);
    76→
    77→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ON cart_items(cart_token, variant_id);
    78→```
    79→
    80→**Upsert rule**: conflict on `(cart_token, variant_id)` → update all fields. Reconfiguring the same product replaces the previous entry. If a customer tries to add the same variant a second time with different dimensions, the first configuration is silently overwritten — the frontend should not offer this path (each product has one variant per colour, so this is not a real use case today).
    81→
    82→**Row lifecycle**: on successful draft order creation in `/api/checkout/complete`, all rows for that `cartToken` are deleted immediately. This prevents a customer from accidentally including already-purchased items in a subsequent checkout.
    83→
    84→**Cleanup**: rows older than 7 days are deleted to handle abandoned carts. Runs on server startup and once every 24 hours via `setInterval`.
    85→
    86→## API endpoints
    87→
    88→### `POST /api/checkout/item`
    89→
    90→Replaces `POST /api/checkout/draft-order`.
    91→
    92→**Request:**
    93→```json
    94→{
    95→  "cartToken": "abc123",
    96→  "variantId": 12345678,
    97→  "en": 200,
    98→  "boy": 250,
    99→  "pileStili": "Kanun Pile",
   100→  "pileOrani": 2.5,
   101→  "kanat": "Tek Kanat",
   102→  "kanatCount": 1
   103→}
   104→```
   105→
   106→**Validation rules for `cartToken`**: must be present, non-empty, alphanumeric + hyphens only, max 64 characters. Parameterised queries prevent SQL injection regardless, but length validation is enforced.
   107→
   108→**Steps:**
   109→1. Validate inputs (same rules as existing endpoint + cartToken format above)
   110→2. Fetch Shopify token via `client_credentials` OAuth
   111→3. Fetch variant price + product title from Shopify REST
   112→4. Calculate: `(en / 100) × pileOrani × kanatCount × basePricePerMeter`
   113→   - Height (`boy_cm`) is **not** part of the price formula — fabric is priced per metre of width. It is stored and displayed in the order as a cutting specification only.
   114→5. Upsert row into `cart_items`
   115→6. Return `{ ok: true, calculatedPrice: "1150.00" }`
   116→   - The frontend uses `calculatedPrice` to display the confirmed price in the Step 4 summary before opening the cart drawer. No checkout URL is returned from this endpoint.
   117→
   118→**Errors:**
   119→
   120→| Status | error | Cause |
   121→|--------|-------|-------|
   122→| 400 | `INVALID_INPUT` | Validation failure |
   123→| 400 | `MISSING_CART_TOKEN` | cartToken absent or empty |
   124→| 404 | `VARIANT_NOT_FOUND` | Shopify variant lookup failed |
   125→| 500 | `AUTH_FAILED` | Shopify OAuth failed |
